Mithril-Runed Tunic  
 


Slot: CHEST
AC: 10
STA: +3 WIS: +5
Focus: Spell Haste II
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)
Mithril-Runed Tunic

Slot: CHEST
AC: 10
STA: +3 WIS: +5
Focus: Spell Haste II
WT: 2.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Leather
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 0, 0
Stackable:No
Merchant Value:4 pp 3 gp 0 sp 0 cp
Tribute:600
Submitted By:Yuegou Windwalker
Lucy Entry By:Kerasota
Item Updated By:Gidono
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-08-02 08:23:11
Page Updated:Mon Apr 10th, 2017

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 2,500pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Rare
Level to Attain: 40

NPC Name
a froglok crusader

Lower Guk


Uploaded July 4th, 2024 by iventheassassin
Send a correction
Post Comment
Haste II and Items with effects
QuoteReply
# Jan 18 2003 at 2:59 PM Rating: Decent
Addikeys
Scholar
539 posts
Would this focus effect (Haste II) help to increase the casting speed of items with effects? For example, the Deepwater helmet takes about 10 seconds to cast. Would wearing the Mithril Runed Tunic help to decrease that casting time? I'd appreciate any information regarding this. Thank you.
____________________________
"Citing your sources isn't spoon feeding, it's basic 101 if you're making an argument."-Jophiel
▲ Page top
RE: Haste II and Items with effects
QuoteReply
# Aug 01 2003 at 9:23 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785154496
9 posts
No, focus effects don't affect clicky items (any more).
▲ Page top
Why so high of a price
QuoteReply
# Apr 07 2002 at 1:19 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251177734
10 posts
I have an Ulthork Hide tunic on my druid 13ac 3wis and 35 PURE mana once over the 200 cap the extra 2 point only gives you about 12 mana so my question is WHY
▲ Page top
RE: Why so high of a price
QuoteReply
# Aug 19 2002 at 11:50 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592252770658
242 posts
Spell haste. I would take this over the ulthork anyday, simply becasue I can cast spells faster with it.
▲ Page top
RE: Why so high of a price
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2002 at 5:47 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251064527
110 posts
Since Luclin, the Wisdom cap has been 255. That probably answers the question of WHY. :) Plus this doesn't have negative 35 HP.

That, and some Druids hear that Wisdom = more mana, so they go for +Wis gear over +Mana gear.
▲ Page top
RE: Why so high of a price
QuoteReply
# Jun 08 2002 at 7:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591776257072
20 posts
actually, the wisdom cap has always been 255 (that's the hard cap beyod which no stat can go). but pre-luclin, you would only receive 1 mana per wisdom point. Now you receive 6 mana per wisdom point over 200. this also takes into consideration that at level 25 each point of wisdom or int is about 5 mana, and at 50 each is about 10 mana (this is 200 and below).
▲ Page top
RE: Why so high of a price
QuoteReply
# Jun 07 2002 at 5:45 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592758554395
180 posts
You think its high when you posted this? watch it jump now that it has spell haste 2, time to find one for my lil cleric.

Edited, Fri Jun 7 18:34:43 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Why so high of a price
QuoteReply
# Apr 17 2002 at 7:46 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1638145982070
View User Forum
Sage
201 posts
Ulthork does have more mana, both before and after the 200 mark. However it is neg 35hp and neg 5cha, while this has an additional 3sta. So I think it's clear why a melee or hybrid would want this. And as for druids, if yuou charm an animal your going to need the cha to keep him charmed, and the hp for when he breaks and beats you down.

Edited, Thu Jun 6 06:45:54 2002
▲ Page top

# Oct 29 2001 at 1:32 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591763907625
2 posts

# Jun 29 2001 at 9:31 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591759920429
3 posts
What does this item look like when equipped on a human druid?
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jan 22 2001 at 6:15 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I think it has the same stats as Foreman's Tunic.
Nope 2 more wis
QuoteReply
# Jan 29 2001 at 6:01 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
Foremans Tunic is only 3 wis and 3 str and weight is .1 as apposed to this 2.5. Same AC though.
▲ Page top
Get stats right
QuoteReply
# Feb 02 2001 at 10:43 AM Rating: Good
Cani
Scholar
46 posts
Foremans tunic has no weight at all. wt0.0

But it is true that it got +3str/wis, and it is AC10 too.

So you trade the 3 str for 3 sta, and you trade 2.5 in weight to get 2 more wis.

Your call if you wanna go there.

Personally I'd go for Ulthork Hide Tunic instead (AC13 +3wis -5cha -35HP +35mana)

35mana = 3.5wis at level 50
35mana = 18wis at level 10
(or thereabouts)
▲ Page top
RE: Get stats right
QuoteReply
